channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: For Johnny and Matthew: Blue Jackets play their home opener with Gaudreaus in mind
item.description: Johnny Gaudreau’s Columbus teammates were given a few options for how to handle their emotions during the Blue Jackets’ home opener. If you want to cry, cry. If you want to laugh, laugh. The only rules — play the game the way “Johnny Hockey” would and with him in mind.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Breanna Stewart and her wife Marta Xargay receive homophobic threats after Game 1 of WNBA Finals
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — New York Liberty star Breanna Stewart and her wife Marta Xargay received threatening homophobic anonymous emails after Game 1 of the WNBA Finals. The emails went directly to Xargay's account, which was a bit unnerving for the couple, Stewart said at practice on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NFL Commissioner Roger Goodell says the league still reviewing latest claims against Deshaun Watson
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — NFL Commissioner Roger Goodell said the league is still reviewing the latest claims of sexual assault and battery against Deshaun Watson.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Injured Alex Cobb dropped from Guardians' ALCS roster, replaced by Ben Lively
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Pitcher Alex Cobb was dropped from Cleveland's AL Championship Series roster on Tuesday after he got hurt yet again in the opener, leaving the Guardians in search of a Game 5 starter against the New York Yankees.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: 76ers' Paul George diagnosed with bone bruise but no structural damage after hyperextending knee
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Philadelphia 76ers forward Paul George has a bone bruise but did not suffer any structural damage when he hyperextended his left knee during a preseason game, the team said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tom Brady's purchase of a minority stake in the Las Vegas Raiders is approved by NFL team owners
item.description: Tom Brady’s purchase of a minority stake in the Las Vegas Raiders has been approved by NFL team owners.
item.dc:creator: Rob Maaddi, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: San Jose State volleyball at the center of another decision on forfeiting
item.description: The University of Nevada has made it clear that its Oct_ 26 volleyball match against San Jose State will go on as scheduled after the team’s players released an independent statement saying they would “refuse to participate in any match that advances injustice against female athletes.”.
item.dc:creator: Mark Anderson, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Browns send Amari Cooper to Bills amid disastrous season; Buffalo gets much-needed weapon
item.description: Following their fourth loss in a row and a struggling Deshaun Watson, the Cleveland Browns have reportedly sent Amari Cooper to the Buffalo Bills.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The Super Bowl will return to Atlanta in 2028: Where will it be played before that?
item.description: Atlanta has secured the 2028 Super Bowl - here are the other cities that will host the NFL's championship game before then.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: The Super Bowl will return to Atlanta's Mercedes-Benz Stadium in 2028
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — The Super Bowl will return to Atlanta in 2028 at the home of the Falcons, following a vote of approval by NFL team owners on Tuesday at the league's annual fall meeting.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dodgers-Mets NLCS Game 1 draws huge audience for FOX Sports
item.description: Game 1 of the National League Championship Series between the New York Mets and Los Angeles Dodgers drew big numbers for FOX Sports on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: That's flippin' amazing! Figure skating Grand Prix season begins with backflips no longer banned
item.description: American figure skater Ilia Malinin has been doing gymnastics off the ice much of his life, one of the many reasons why he can so effortlessly land the dazzling quadruple jumps that made him a world champion at just 19 years old last March.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jets are giving holdout Haason Reddick permission to seek a trade
item.description: Haason Reddick has been given permission to seek a trade, New York Jets owner Woody Johnson said at the NFL's fall meetings in Atlanta on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Logano gets back into playoffs following Bowman disqualification and has sights set on 3rd Cup title
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Joey Logano hoped he'd done enough to advance in NASCAR's playoffs with an eighth-place finish at Charlotte Motor Speedway. But when he left the track Sunday night, he was four points below the cutline and eliminated from any shot at winning a third Cup Series title.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The cost of rising number of injuries in European soccer nears $800 million, report finds
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — The rising number of injuries to top soccer players came at a cost of nearly $800 million to teams across Europe's leading leagues last season, according to a report published Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: You can design L.A.’s official World Cup 2026 poster: Here’s how
item.description: Calling all Los Angeles County residents (over the age of 18) with artistic skills! The Los Angeles World Cup 2026 Host Committee announced Tuesday that they are searching for local artists and designers to be part of a “once-in-a-generation opportunity” to create the official regional poster for t
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Cowboys' Jerry Jones gets testy with radio hosts over questions about roster construction after blowout loss
item.description: Dallas Cowboys owner Jerry Jones was uninterested in talking about the offseason and building the roster and got testy with radio hosts about it.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jets acquire Raiders wide receiver Davante Adams, AP sources say
item.description: The New York Jets have agreed to terms to acquire disgruntled wide receiver Davante Adams from the Las Vegas Raiders, reuniting him with quarterback Aaron Rodgers, two people with knowledge of the deal told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jets acquire wide receiver Davante Adams from Raiders, reuniting him with Aaron Rodgers
item.description: Aaron Rodgers and Davante Adams are finally reunited after more than two years of separation and one year of speculation and now they’ll try to save the New York Jets' sinking season.
item.dc:creator: Dennis Waszak Jr., Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Jets' Aaron Rodgers calls officiating in loss 'a little ridiculous'
item.description: New York Jets quarterback Aaron Rodgers ripped the officiating in Monday night's loss to the Buffalo Bills, even a call that was to his benefit.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jets' Aaron Rodgers throws a 52-yard Hail Mary to Allen Lazard to end the first half vs. Bills
item.description: EAST RUTHERFORD, N.J. (AP) — Aaron Rodgers did it again. The New York Jets quarterback threw a 52-yard Hail Mary touchdown pass to Allen Lazard as time expired in the first half of a 23-20 loss to the Buffalo Bills on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Grand Junction football's future looks bright
item.description: At 6-1, it’s the Tigers' best start to a season since 2011. And Grand Junction appears to be set for long-term success.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Jets' Aaron Rodgers throws incredible Hail Mary TD pass before halftime vs Bills
item.description: New York Jets quarterback Aaron Rodgers launched up a prayer before halftime against the Buffalo Bills on Monday night and it was answered.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lindor homers as Mets stop Dodgers' scoreless streak in 7-3 win, head to NY with NLCS tied 1-1
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The New York Mets weren't sure what they were going to get with the Los Angeles Dodgers sending out a parade of relievers in a bullpen game. They found out right away.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Matt McCarty wins first PGA event at Black Desert Championship
item.description: IVINS, Utah (AP) - IVINS, Utah (AP) — Matt McCarty started the year on the Korn Ferry Tour and now is headed to the Masters, winning his first PGA Tour title Sunday at the Black Desert Championship with a 4-under 67 and one swing that all but sealed it.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Keller scores game-winner in OT as Utah HC stays unbeaten
item.description: NEW YORK (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club took a big bite out of the Big Apple this week. After an overtime win over the New York Islanders on Thursday, Utah did the same thing to the Rangers at Madison Square Garden on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Los Angeles Dodgers announce starting pitcher for NLCS Game 1
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers relied on spectacular pitching to escape the NL Division Series in five games against the San Diego Padres, and it's nearly time to see if those performances will carry over into the NL Championship Series.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Kucherov scores go-ahead goal, two empty-netters to push Lightning past Hurricanes in season opener
item.description: Nikita Kucherov had a third-period hat trick to help the Tampa Bay Lightning beat the Carolina Hurricanes 4-1 in Friday night's season opener for both teams.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: What is the story behind the iconic San Diego Chicken?
item.description: Fifty years ago, an iconic professional mascot emerged in San Diego, clad in bright orange and yellow feathers. For decades since, the San Diego Chicken has captivated fans with his comedic bits and sketches in various venues around the world.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Dodgers vs. Padres: Who is favored to win tonight's NLDS Game 5?
item.description: LOS ANGELES - Friday night’s winner-take-all NL Division Series Game 5 between the San Diego Padres and Los Angeles Dodgers promises to be a thrilling finale to a contentious series between the division rivals.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, KTLA 5

item.title: Ahead of team's game in London, Bears president says he remains steadfast on proceeding with plans for new lakefront stadium
item.description: WARE, England (AP) — The Bears remain focused on the city’s lakefront as the location for a nearly $5 billion stadium development project, team president and CEO Kevin Warren reiterated Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Blackhawks' rally falls short in season-opening 5-2 loss in Utah
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) — The Utah Hockey Club got off to a great start in its new hometown Tuesday night. The Blackhawks' start, meanwhile, was less than ideal. Utah never trailed in a season opener, building a 3-0 lead before holding off a Chicago rally for a 5-2 victory.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Tatis homers again as the Padres beat the Dodgers 6-5 for a 2-1 NLDS lead
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — Fernando Tatis Jr.'s towering two-run home run highlighted a six-run second inning, and the San Diego Padres held on to beat Shohei Ohtani and the rival Los Angeles Dodgers 6-5 on Tuesday night to take a 2-1 lead in a tense NL Division Series.
item.dc:creator: BERNIE WILSON, Associated Press, KTLA 5
